name: PropertyElement.PropertyElementType.ChamferMarkPropertyElementTypes
summary: The ChamferMarkPropertyElementTypes class represents the available property element types for chamfer marks.

methods.name: DX
methods.summary: Returns the change in the X direction property element type.

methods.name: DY
methods.summary: Returns the change in the Y direction property element type.

methods.name: Length
methods.summary: Returns the length property element type.

methods.name: Name
methods.summary: Returns the name property element type.
